---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence: what do you want RelayClaw to do that it does not do today?

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve? What is currently painful or missing? Be specific.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want. If this involves schema changes, describe the new columns/tables. If it involves a new CLI command or tool action, describe the interface.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you thought about solving this, and why you ruled them out.

## Scope

Which layer does this primarily affect? Check all that apply:

- [ ] Schema / Supabase migration
- [ ] `relay_handoff` tool (new action or param)
- [ ] CLI commands
- [ ] Heartbeat / dead-drop service
- [ ] Approval gate / notifications
- [ ] Cost ledger
- [ ] Agent skill document (`SKILL.md`)
- [ ] Hermes compatibility
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## RelayClaw context

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OpenClaw version | |
| RelayClaw version | |
| Affected agent(s) (`agent_id`) | |
| Related handoff or chain ID (if applicable) | |

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, related issues, or anything else useful.
